prompt:
A gloved hand turns material inside a 5 gallon compost bucket, showing loosened, steaming scraps under a fresh brown layer. A thermometer and moisture meter rest nearby on a patio surface, hinting at monitoring.

The 512×512 photorealistic solarpunk setting keeps the bucket and stirred contents in focus with blurred planters behind it. There are no logos or readable text, and no faces are visible.
